evals.prompt: Set up a shared wiki under `llm/wiki/` and ingest this source without touching app code.
evals.expected_output: Uses `llm/wiki/` as the configured wiki root, keeps all planned writes inside that root, creates raw/article/index/log outputs, and avoids modifying app code or CI files.

evals.prompt: Run this as a local PR workflow because CI cannot access the API key.
evals.expected_output: Chooses the Local PR workflow, prepares wiki-root-only changes, and states that a maintainer reviews and merges the PR.

evals.prompt: Run PR-lint and verify all changed files are under the configured wiki root.
evals.expected_output: Performs report-only PR-lint checks for path boundary, append-only log entry, Change-ID uniqueness, and diff/log consistency.

evals.prompt: Archive the corrected final answer as a memory-bank entry and mark it clearly in the index.
evals.expected_output: Archives only the revised final answer, creates a memory-bank article, prefixes the index summary with [Memory], and records follow-up items instead of changing unrelated articles.

evals.prompt: Compact May log entries and include commit IDs for each Change-ID.
evals.expected_output: Compacts requested log entries only on request, resolves related commits from git history, records retention status, and does not delete detailed entries without approval.

evals.prompt: Detect a conflict marker in the wiki log and report it without auto-fixing.
evals.expected_output: Reports the conflict marker as a blocking PR-lint issue and does not attempt to merge, reorder, or rewrite the log entry.
